**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Yinhe Electronics Co., Ltd. is yet another contrast sample with a domineering name but a miniaturized entity. The system has forcefully cleared the massive hallucination of Apple Inc. and its global supply chain implanted at the bottom level. Although its name carries a grandiose term like 'Yinhe Electronics' (Galaxy Electronics), and it was rigidly categorized by the official system into the high-end manufacturing category of 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing,' physical and capital indicators instantly exposed its bottom line: this is a micro-enterprise with only '2' insured employees in 2024. The paid-in capital is only 460,000 RMB, and the office address is located in 'Block C, 6th Floor' of a commercial and residential building on Changfu Street. In a single room of a few dozen square meters on the sixth floor, relying on two employees to manufacture electronic devices is an out-and-out physical joke. Striking directly at its extremely clean business license—'sales of power electronic components, sales of smart instrumentation, sales of power distribution switch control equipment'—there is absolutely no mention of manufacturing or production. Diagnostic conclusion: this is a typical 'two-person show' Micro-Trading Agency for electrical appliances/electronic components. It makes a living by proxying or reselling power distribution equipment and basic electronic components, having no relationship whatsoever with physical manufacturing.
